text.title: Laravel Layered Patterns (Controller → Service → Resource) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for migrating a Laravel module to layered architecture.

step.name: audit-current-state
step.action: Run laravel-anti-pattern-lint.sh. Count fat controllers + inline validations + raw responses + inline auth + tx in controllers.

step.name: extract-services
step.action: Create app/Services/OrderService.php with constructor injection of model. Move business logic + DB::transaction from controller into service methods.

step.name: extract-form-requests
step.action: Generate StoreOrderRequest + UpdateOrderRequest. Move rules + messages. Add authorize() calling $this->user()->can(...).

step.name: create-resources-and-policies
step.action: Generate OrderResource with explicit toArray. Create OrderPolicy; register in AuthServiceProvider; call authorizeResource in controller __construct.

step.name: verify-and-document
step.action: Run audit again — must show 0 fat controllers, 0 inline validations, 0 raw responses, 0 inline auth. Update CONTRIBUTING.md with layering rules.
step.decision-gate: If audit > 0 violations, STOP and continue refactoring.
